views.name: Comptes
views.definition: CREATE VIEW Comptes AS SELECT dbo.GS_ACC_BASE.ACC_ID AS ID, dbo.GS_ACC_ROOT.CODE, dbo.GS_ACC_ROOT.DESCRIPTION, GS_PARTY_BASE_1.CODE AS Banque, dbo.GS_PARTY_BASE.CODE AS Société, dbo.GS_ACC_ROOT.CUR_ID AS Devises, dbo.GS_ACC.ACC_ID, dbo.GS_CMPGRP.CODE AS Groupe_Sociétés, dbo.GS_CMPGRP.DESCRIPTION AS Description_groupe_de_sociétés, dbo.GS_ACCGRP.CODE AS Groupe_de_comptes FROM dbo.GS_ACCGRP_2_ACC INNER JOIN dbo.GS_ACCGRP ON dbo.GS_ACCGRP_2_ACC.ACCGRP_ID = dbo.GS_ACCGRP.ACCGRP_ID RIGHT OUTER JOIN dbo.GS_PARTY_BASE INNER JOIN dbo.GS_ACC_BASE ON dbo.GS_PARTY_BASE.PARTY_ID = dbo.GS_ACC_BASE.CMP_ID INNER JOIN dbo.GS_ACC_ROOT ON dbo.GS_ACC_BASE.ACC_ID = dbo.GS_ACC_ROOT.ACC_ID INNER JOIN dbo.GS_ACC ON dbo.GS_ACC_ROOT.ACC_ID = dbo.GS_ACC.ACC_ID INNER JOIN dbo.GS_BNKBR ON dbo.GS_ACC.BNKBR_ID = dbo.GS_BNKBR.BNKBR_ID INNER JOIN dbo.GS_PARTY_BASE AS GS_PARTY_BASE_1 ON dbo.GS_BNKBR.BNK_ID = GS_PARTY_BASE_1.PARTY_ID ON dbo.GS_ACCGRP_2_ACC.ACC_ID = dbo.GS_ACC_ROOT.ACC_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN dbo.GS_CMPGRP INNER JOIN dbo.GS_CMPGRP_2_CMP ON dbo.GS_CMPGRP.CMPGRP_ID = dbo.GS_CMPGRP_2_CMP.CMPGRP_ID ON dbo.GS_ACC_BASE.CMP_ID = dbo.GS_CMPGRP_2_CMP.CMP_ID

views.name: Transactions bancaires
views.definition: CREATE VIEW [Transactions bancaires] AS SELECT dbo.Comptes.CODE, dbo.Comptes.DESCRIPTION, dbo.Comptes.Banque, dbo.Comptes.Société, dbo.CS_BKTRN.AMOUNT, CASE WHEN dbo.CS_BKTRN.ISDEBIT = 1 THEN dbo.CS_BKTRN.AMOUNT * - 1 ELSE dbo.CS_BKTRN.AMOUNT END AS [montant avec signe], dbo.CS_BKTRN.CUR_ID_TRNCURRENCY, dbo.CS_BKTRN.TRNDATE, dbo.CS_BKTRN.VALUEDATE, dbo.CS_BKTRN.ISDEBIT, CASE WHEN dbo.CS_BKTRN.RECSTATE = 0 THEN Non rapprochées WHEN dbo.CS_BKTRN.RECSTATE = 2 THEN Rapprochées WHEN dbo.CS_BKTRN.RECSTATE = 4 THEN Annulées ELSE CAST(dbo.CS_BKTRN.RECSTATE AS VARCHAR) END AS Statut, dbo.Comptes.Groupe_Sociétés FROM dbo.CS_BKTRN INNER JOIN dbo.Comptes ON dbo.CS_BKTRN.CSH2ACC_ID = dbo.Comptes.ID

views.name: Dernière integration bancaire
views.definition: CREATE VIEW [Dernière integration bancaire] AS SELECT C.CODE, C.Banque, C.Société, C.Devises, F.CLOSINGBALANCEAMOUNT, F.CLOSINGBALANCEDATETIME, CASE WHEN F.CLOSINGBALANCECREDITINDICATOR = 1 THEN F.CLOSINGBALANCEAMOUNT ELSE F.CLOSINGBALANCEAMOUNT * - 1 END AS MontantAvecSigne, dbo.CS_BNKFLSTLNK.STATE FROM dbo.Comptes AS C INNER JOIN dbo.GS_BNKFLST AS F ON F.ACC_ID = C.ID INNER JOIN dbo.CS_BNKFLSTLNK ON F.BNKFLST_ID = dbo.CS_BNKFLSTLNK.BNKFLSTLNK_ID WHERE (C.CODE IS NOT NULL) AND (C.CODE <> "") AND (dbo.CS_BNKFLSTLNK.STATE = 64)

views.name: SI_Trésorerie
views.definition: CREATE VIEW SI_Trésorerie AS SELECT dbo.Comptes.CODE, dbo.Comptes.DESCRIPTION, dbo.Comptes.Banque, dbo.Comptes.Société, CASE WHEN dbo.CS_BAL_ACC_CF.ISDEBITI = 1 THEN dbo.CS_BAL_ACC_CF.AMOUNTI * - 1 ELSE dbo.CS_BAL_ACC_CF.AMOUNTI END AS AMOUNTI, dbo.CS_BAL_ACC_CF.ISDEBITI, dbo.CS_BAL_ACC_CF.TRNDATE FROM dbo.CS_BAL_ACC_CF INNER JOIN dbo.Comptes ON dbo.CS_BAL_ACC_CF.CSH2ACC_ID = dbo.Comptes.ID WHERE (dbo.CS_BAL_ACC_CF.TRNDATE IS NOT NULL)

views.name: SI_Bancaire
views.definition: CREATE VIEW SI_Bancaire AS SELECT dbo.Comptes.CODE, dbo.Comptes.DESCRIPTION, dbo.Comptes.Banque, dbo.Comptes.Société, CASE WHEN dbo.CS_BAL_ACC_BNK.ISDEBITI = 1 THEN dbo.CS_BAL_ACC_BNK.AMOUNTI * - 1 ELSE dbo.CS_BAL_ACC_BNK.AMOUNTI END AS AMOUNTI, dbo.CS_BAL_ACC_BNK.ISDEBITI, dbo.CS_BAL_ACC_BNK.TRNDATE FROM dbo.CS_BAL_ACC_BNK INNER JOIN dbo.Comptes ON dbo.CS_BAL_ACC_BNK.CSH2ACC_ID = dbo.Comptes.ID WHERE (dbo.CS_BAL_ACC_BNK.TRNDATE IS NOT NULL)

views.name: Journal
views.definition: CREATE VIEW Journal AS SELECT dbo.CS_FLOWCDS.CODE, dbo.CS_FLOWCDS.DESCRIPTION, dbo.CS_FLOWSCTS.DESCRIPTION AS Sous_Catégorie_flux, dbo.CS_FLOWCTS.DESCRIPTION AS Catégorie_flux, dbo.CS_CSHFL.AMOUNT AS [Montant ABS], dbo.CS_CSHFL.ISDEBIT, dbo.CS_CSHFL.TRNDATE AS [Date de transaction], dbo.CS_CSHFL.VALUEDATE AS [date de valeur], CASE dbo.CS_CSHFL.STATUS WHEN 0 THEN Prévision WHEN 1 THEN Confirmé WHEN 2 THEN Réalisé ELSE Inconnu END AS Statut, CASE WHEN dbo.CS_CSHFL.ISDEBIT = 1 THEN dbo.CS_CSHFL.AMOUNT * - 1 ELSE dbo.CS_CSHFL.AMOUNT END AS Montant_avec_signe, dbo.Comptes.CODE AS Compte, dbo.Comptes.Banque, dbo.Comptes.Société FROM dbo.CS_CSHFL INNER JOIN dbo.CS_FLOWCDS ON dbo.CS_CSHFL.FLOWCDS_ID = dbo.CS_FLOWCDS.FLOWCDS_ID INNER JOIN dbo.CS_FLOWSCTS ON dbo.CS_FLOWCDS.FLOWSCTS_ID = dbo.CS_FLOWSCTS.FLOWSCTS_ID INNER JOIN dbo.CS_FLOWCTS ON dbo.CS_FLOWSCTS.FLOWCTS_ID = dbo.CS_FLOWCTS.FLOWCTS_ID INNER JOIN dbo.Comptes ON dbo.CS_CSHFL.CSH2ACC_ID = dbo.Comptes.ID

views.name: FINANCEMENT_BI
views.definition: CREATE VIEW FINANCEMENT_BI AS SELECT dbo.DI_TRNB.TRN_ID, dbo.DI_TRNB.PRPSTARTDATE AS [Date début], dbo.DI_TRNB.PRPENDDATE AS [Date fin], dbo.DI_TRNB.PRPTRNAMOUNT AS Montant, dbo.DI_TRNB.CUR_ID_PRPTRNCCY AS [Devises financement], dbo.DI_TRNTP.CODE AS type_transaction, DATEDIFF(DAY, dbo.DI_TRNB.PRPSTARTDATE, dbo.DI_TRNB.PRPENDDATE) AS maturité, CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(DAY, dbo.DI_TRNB.PRPSTARTDATE, dbo.DI_TRNB.PRPENDDATE) <= 365 THEN Court terme ELSE Moyen ou long terme END AS type FROM dbo.DI_TRNTP INNER JOIN dbo.DI_TRNB ON dbo.DI_TRNTP.TRNTP_ID = dbo.DI_TRNB.TRNTP_ID_GNRLTYPE
